description: The inventory team needs to understand if different product categories have different seasonal peaks. Using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset in Oracle Analytics Desktop, create a Radar Line chart to visualize seasonal sales patterns. The visualization should use 'Order Date' (by Month) for the Angle, 'Revenue' for the Radius, and 'Product Category' for the Color series. Save the workbook as 'Seasonality_Analysis' in the default Documents folder.
